message.content:
The Logistic Service page contains the following UI elements, text, and sections:  

### 1. Header Section  
- **Title**: “Goods” (bold, top - most text).  
- **Sub - title**: “Option : 1” (directly below “Goods”).  


### 2. “Tell us about your goods” Section  
- **Section Title**: “Tell us about your goods” (bold, centered under “Option : 1”).  

#### Form Fields & Labels:  
- **“Goods value” Field**:  
  - Label: “Goods value” (with a small “?” icon, likely for a tooltip).  
  - Input Field: A rectangular text input box (empty, for entering a value).  
  - Currency Dropdown: A dropdown menu with “USD” selected (arrow icon on the right, indicating it can be expanded to change currency).  

- **Checkbox**:  
  - Label: “Shipment contains hazardous goods” (text next to an empty checkbox).  

- **“Are your goods ready?” Field**:  
  - Label: “Are your goods ready?” (with a small “?” icon, likely for a tooltip).  
  - Dropdown Menu:  
    - Placeholder/Default Text: “Select timeframe” (displayed in an orange - bordered rectangular box, indicating it is active/focused).  
    - Dropdown Options (visible when expanded):  
      - “Yes, my goods are ready”  
      - “Will be ready within two weeks”  
      - “Will be ready in more than two weeks”  


### 3. “Option : 2” Section  
- **Title**: “Option : 2” (bold, below the “Option : 1” section).  
- **Description**: “Admin will map what are the general goods, special goods etc.,” (plain text, explaining the purpose of Option 2).  


### Visual & Layout Details  
- The page has a clean, minimalistic design with a white background.  
- Form elements (input, dropdown, checkbox) are aligned vertically under their respective labels.  
- The dropdown for “Are your goods ready?” has an orange border, highlighting it as the active/focused element.  
- All text is in a standard, readable font (likely sans - serif), with section titles in bold for emphasis.
